prompt: Generate a landscape oil painting with the trees from image 1 and the mountain background from image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate a majestic landscape oil painting. The foreground and midground should feature a dense, verdant forest composed of tall, coniferous trees, embodying the style and prominent central tree observed in image 1. In the background, incorporate a grand, snow-capped mountain range, mirroring the majestic peak and rugged lower slopes visible in image 2. The scene should be set under a bright blue sky dotted with white clouds.
objects: verdant, tall coniferous trees in foreground and midground
prominent central tree (as observed in image 1)
grand, snow-capped mountain range in background
